params.orderDigest: The EIP-712 order digest to approve.

cleanExpiredOrders(bytes32[]).details: Reverts with OrderNotExpired if validTo has not passed yet for any order.

params.orderDigests: The order digests (CoW) or Permit2 hashes (UniswapX) to clean up.

params.vaultRelayer_: CoW vault relayer address (approved for ERC-20 pulls during settlement).

params.newOwner: The address of the new owner.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

revokeApprovals(address[]).details: Silently skips tokens whose current allowance is already zero.

params.tokens: The sell tokens whose approvals should be revoked.

params.orderDigest: The EIP-712 order digest to revoke.

trade(bytes).details: Tokens are transferred to this contract and the vault relayer allowance is increased.      The order must be submitted to the CoW API by an off-chain service.      Settlement is asynchronous (solver fills the order in a batch).

params.data: Encoded: (sellToken, sellAmount, buyToken, buyAmountMin) or             (sellToken, sellAmount, buyToken, buyAmountMin, validTo) or             (sellToken, sellAmount, buyToken, buyAmountMin, validTo, isSellOrder)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

approveOrderDigest(bytes32).notice: Approve an order digest for EIP-1271 signing (single orders).

cancelTrade(bytes).notice: Cancel a single trade by revoking its order digest and PreSignature.

cleanExpiredOrders(bytes32[]).notice: Permissionlessly clean up multiple expired orders: revokes approvals, transfers         any remaining sell token balances back to the owner.

getOrderDigest((address,address,address,.notice: Compute order digest for a given order (for off-chain order submission).

revokeApprovals(address[]).notice: Revoke token approvals to the settlement/relayer contract for multiple tokens.

trade(bytes).notice: Submit a single CoW Protocol order using PreSign + EIP-1271.
